mapper.sql: id, sys_no, soli_project_id, data_status, ethic_expert, ethic_chk_result, ethic_audit_date, ethic_audit_desc, is_feedbacked
mapper.select: select id as rowId,soli_project_id as soliProjectId,ethic_chk_result as ethicChkResult, case when ethic_chk_result="2" then "审核通过" when ethic_chk_result="4" then "修改后重审" when ethic_chk_result="5" then "修改后提交" end as ethicChkResultName ,ethic_audit_desc as ethicAuditDesc,data_status as dataStatus,ethic_audit_date as ethicAuditDate from srm_project_solicit_ethic_audit spsg where soli_project_id=#{projectSolicitEthicAuditDto.soliProjectId} and sys_no="P011" and ethic_expert=#{projectSolicitEthicAuditDto.userId}
mapper.update: update srm_project_solicit_ethic_audit set is_cancel=1 where sys_no=#{sysNo} and soli_project_id=#{ywRowId}
